channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: New API from EchoMark Enables Digital Watermarking Integration in Any Communications Software
item.description: EchoMark's novel digital watermarking tool integrates with existing communications software through a new API, enabling organizations to safeguard sensitive information and prevent leaks.
item.dc:creator: Jared Keller, Fast Company

item.title: LinkedIn’s big bet on TikTok-style video is paying off in a big way
item.description: Is LinkedIn the new TikTok? Short-form video is now the fastest-growing category on LinkedIn, growing at twice the rate of other post formats on the platform. According to LinkedIn, total video viewership surged 36% in the first quarter of 2025.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: The Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra’s S Pen change is getting ever more confusing and disappointing
item.description: Samsung is charging a high price for replacement S Pens, and oddly it seems to have included unneeded components.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Google TV carries out a major cull of its free channels – and it's bad news for Bob Ross fans
item.description: US viewers don't have quite as many channels to watch as they did before, but there's still a lot of choice.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Future AirPods Pro could swap the touch-sensing swipe control for something smarter, and it sounds like a great upgrade
item.description: A new patent from Apple points to improved touch controls for the AirPods Pro – even if you’re wearing gloves.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Databricks acquires BladeBridge to aid data warehouse migrations
item.description: Data lakehouse provider Databricks has acquired data platform modernization software provider BladeBridge for an undisclosed sum to help its new customers move from rival data warehouses, such as Teradata, Snowflake, Amazon Redshift, and Microsoft SQL Server, to its lakehouse built atop Databricks S
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Marvel strongly denies using AI in The Fantastic Four: First Steps' new poster, but I'm not buying it and neither is ChatGPT
item.description: Marvel denies using AI to generate posters for The Fantastic Four: First Steps, but I'm still on the fence.
item.dc:creator: john-anthony.disotto@futurenet.com (John-Anthony Disotto), TechRadar

item.title: Apple lashes out at iPhone porn app maker and the EU rules allowing its download
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple has chided a newly introduced pornography app available in the European Union, warning that the bloc’s digital rules opening the way for third-party app store downloads undermines consumer confidence in the tech giant.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Google's rising holiday's season ad sales aren't enough to ease worries about AI letdown
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google's digital ad sales continued to grow at a healthy clip during the holiday season, but that wasn't enough to offset investors' worries about whether its big bet on artificial intelligence will be lucrative as once envisioned.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: State universities launch “landmark” AI quest for students and profs
item.description: The California State University system has teamed up with several tech titans to launch a "landmark" AI quest.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Twitch has plenty of competition in the livestream economy. CEO Dan Clancy isn’t worried
item.description: Business leaders are often reluctant to speak about their competition. It’s rare that you’ll hear Netflix’s Ted Sarandos talk about Disney+, or Skims’s Jens Grede speak about Spanx. It’s uncouth and unhelpful, a good PR will tell you.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Navy PEO Digital’s goals riding on Flank Speed’s success
item.description: Louis Koplin, the acting program executive officer for the Navy’s PEO-Digital, said priorities for 2025 include cyber resiliency and expanding BYOD. The post Navy PEO Digital’s goals riding on Flank Speed’s success first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Hawley makes push to allow parents to sue tech companies
item.description: Sen. Josh Hawley (R-Mo.) said Tuesday he will introduce legislation to empower parents to sue leading social media companies over alleged harms to children and teens.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Europe’s DMA gives another big boost to iOS platform decay
item.description: One of a handful of “independent” iOS app stores in Europe has begun the distribution of a porn app, advertising it as “Apple Approved.” The app isn’t approved by Apple, and the biggest app available on the AltStore is Epic’s child-focused Fortnite game.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Mystery OPM server that aided buyout offers prompts House Democrat probe
item.description: House Oversight Democrats are demanding answers about the installation of a “server of unknown nature and origin” at the Office of Personnel Management (OPM) that aided the agency in sending buyout offers to federal employees.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, The Hill

item.title: Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin mimics the moon's gravity for NASA experiments during spaceflight
item.description: Jeff Bezos' rocket company has given NASA a brief taste of the moon's gravity without straying too far from home.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The Fantastic Four: First Steps - A New Era for Marvel's First Family?
item.description: The Fantastic Four: First Steps - A new era for Marvel's First Family? Get the latest news and updates on this highly anticipated movie.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Google makes its appeal to overturn jury verdict branding the Play Store as illegal monopoly
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google went to appeals court Monday in an attempt to convince a three-judge panel to overturn a jury's verdict declaring its app store for Android smartphones as an illegal monopoly and block the penalties imposed by a federal judge to stop the misbehavior.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Canada's most populous province to pause retaliatory measures as US puts tariffs on hold
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — The leader of Ontario, Canada’s most populous province, said Monday he will pause all retaliatory measures against the United States after news broke that the threat of tariffs has been put on hold for a month.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Taiwan chip tariff would raise industry costs, analysts say
item.description: President Donald Trump continues to use tariffs like a club to get his way, and is threatening to place tariffs on computer chips made in Taiwan, warning the additional charges could reach as high as 100%.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Trump signs order to create US sovereign wealth fund, eyeing TikTok purchase
item.description: President Trump on Monday directed secretaries to begin a process to create an American sovereign wealth fund, suggesting it could partially own the popular app TikTok.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Why second-user smartphone sales are good for Apple
item.description: Apple’s iPhone business isn’t just about new product sales. The second-user and services markets need to be considered, too.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Thinking of moving off VMware? Gartner tallies cost of large-scale VMware migration
item.description: Broadcom’s $61 billion acquisition of VMware caused quite a stir in the technology industry and continues to prompt VMware customers to consider alternatives.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates explores the making of his internal operating system in new memoir
item.description: As he prepares to turn 70 later this year, Microsoft founder Bill Gates' new memoir explores how his childhood quirks, upbringing, friendships and experiences coalesced into shaping his internal operating system.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Most talked-about Super Bowl ads
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says Super Bowl 2025 ads promise star power and laughs, featuring Beckham's twin reveal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Santa Clara County accuses companies of causing ‘environmental and human health crisis’ via ‘forever chemicals’ in drinking water
item.description: The legal action comes amid worldwide attention on PFAS, used widely to create products resistant to water, stains, and heat, including food packaging, non-stick pans, clothing, rain jackets, furniture, carpeting, plastic turf, paints, electronics products and a host of other goods.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: US cybersecurity agency's future role in elections remains murky under the Trump administration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The nation’s cybersecurity agency has played a critical role in helping states shore up the defenses of their voting systems, but its election mission appears uncertain amid sustained criticism from Republicans and key figures in the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: DeepSeek underscores US-China race for AI dominance, OpenAI says
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
